documentation:
## Aliyun ROS PAIDLC Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as PAIDLC from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-paidlc';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.Job

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.Job.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.Job.attr_job_id
documentation: Attribute JobId: The task ID created this time.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PAIDLC::Job`, which is used to create a Machine Learning Platform for AI (PAI) job to run in a cluster.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosJob\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-paidlc-job>

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.JobProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Job`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-paidlc-job>

```
param display_name

Property displayName: The name of the task is as follows: The name length does not exceed 256 characters. Allow numbers, letters, lower strokes (_), English period (.) And short horizontal lines (-).

param job_specs

Property jobSpecs: Jobspecs describes various configurations of tasks during the mission, such as mirror address, start command, node resource statement, number of copies, etc. The DLC task consists of different types of nodes. The same type of nodes have exactly the same configuration. This configuration is called a Jobspec. Jobspecs describes the configuration of all types of nodes and is the array of Jobspec.

param job_type

Property jobType: The type of job. Values: TFJob, PyTorchJob, XGBoostJob, OneFlowJob, ElasticBatch

param user_command

Property userCommand: Start commands of all nodes in the task.

param workspace_id

Property workspaceId: Work space ID, how to get working space ID, see listworkSpaces.

param code_source

Property codeSource: The code source used in this task.Before the mission node starts, the DLC will automatically download the code configured in the code source, and mount to the local directory of the container.

param data_sources

Property dataSources: List of data source used for task operation.

param envs

Property envs: Environment variable configuration.

param job_max_running_time_minutes

Property jobMaxRunningTimeMinutes: The longest running time is running, and the unit is minutes.

param options

Property options: The additional configuration of this task can adjust some of the behavior of the mounting data source through this parameter.If the task has a data source that mounted the OSS type, you can cover the default parameters of the jinofs by configure the configuration of this parameter to fs.OSS.DOWNLOAD.CONCURRENCY = 4, fs.oss.download.queue.size = 16.

param priority

Property priority: The priority of the task, optional parameter, default value 1, the range of parameter values is 1 ~ 9.in: 1 is the minimum priority. 9 is the highest priority.

param resource_id

Property resourceId: Resource group ID, optional parameter. The parameter value is empty indicating that submitted to the public resource group. If the current working space has been bound to a proprietary resource group, you can specify the corresponding resource group ID here; how to create a proprietary resource group and inquire about the proprietary resource group ID, please refer to the preparation and management of the DLC resource group cluster.

param settings

Property settings: Job settings.

param success_policy

Property successPolicy: The successful strategy of distributed multi -machine tasks is currently only supported by TensorFlow's multi -machine task. ChiefWorker: When it is specified as this value, as long as the Chief's POD is successful, it is considered that the entire task is successful. All workers: All workers must be successful to think that the entire task is successful.

param thirdparty_lib_dir

Property thirdpartyLibDir: The name folder of the Requirements.txt file is located; before each node runs the specified usercommand, PAI -DLC will take the requirements.txt file from the specified folder and call the PIP Install -R installation.

param thirdparty_libs

Property thirdpartyLibs: Python third-party library list to be installed.

param user_vpc

Property userVpc: User VPC configuration.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.JobProps.display_name
documentation:
Property displayName: The name of the task is as follows: The name length does not exceed 256 characters.

Allow numbers, letters, lower strokes (_), English period (.) And short horizontal lines (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.JobProps.job_specs
documentation:
Property jobSpecs: Jobspecs describes various configurations of tasks during the mission, such as mirror address, start command, node resource statement, number of copies, etc.

The DLC task consists of different types of nodes. The same type of nodes have exactly the same configuration. This configuration is called a Jobspec. Jobspecs describes the configuration of all types of nodes and is the array of Jobspec.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.JobProps.job_type
documentation:
Property jobType: The type of job.

Values: TFJob, PyTorchJob, XGBoostJob, OneFlowJob, ElasticBatch

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.JobProps.options
documentation: Property options: The additional configuration of this task can adjust some of the behavior of the mounting data source through this parameter.If the task has a data source that mounted the OSS type, you can cover the default parameters of the jinofs by configure the configuration of this parameter to fs.OSS.DOWNLOAD.CONCURRENCY = 4, fs.oss.download.queue.size = 16.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.JobProps.priority
documentation: Property priority: The priority of the task, optional parameter, default value 1, the range of parameter values is 1 ~ 9.in: 1 is the minimum priority. 9 is the highest priority.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.JobProps.resource_id
documentation:
Property resourceId: Resource group ID, optional parameter.

The parameter value is empty indicating that submitted to the public resource group.
If the current working space has been bound to a proprietary resource group, you can specify the corresponding resource group ID here; how to create a proprietary resource group and inquire about the proprietary resource group ID, please refer to the preparation and management of the DLC resource group cluster.

documentation: Property settings: Job settings.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.JobProps.success_policy
documentation:
Property successPolicy: The successful strategy of distributed multi -machine tasks is currently only supported by TensorFlow's multi -machine task.

ChiefWorker: When it is specified as this value, as long as the Chief's POD is successful, it is considered that the entire task is successful.
All workers: All workers must be successful to think that the entire task is successful.

documentation: Property thirdpartyLibDir: The name folder of the Requirements.txt file is located; before each node runs the specified usercommand, PAI -DLC will take the requirements.txt file from the specified folder and call the PIP Install -R installation.

documentation: Property thirdpartyLibs: Python third-party library list to be installed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.CodeSourceProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param branch: true
param code_source_id: true
param commit: true
param mount_path: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.CodeSourceProperty.code_source_id
documentation: :Property: codeSourceId: Code source ID.How to get code source ID, see ListCodesources.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.CodeSourceProperty.branch
documentation: :Property: branch: When running this task, the branch of the cited code warehouse can be selected, and the configuration branch field can be used by default.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.CodeSourceProperty.commit
documentation: :Property: commit: This task needs to download the code Commit ID, optional parameters, and use the Commith configuration of the code source by default.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.CodeSourceProperty.mount_path
documentation: :Property: mountPath: This task needs to be mounted, optional parameters, and the mounting path is configured in the default code source.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.DataSourcesProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param data_source_id: true
param mount_path: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.DataSourcesProperty.data_source_id
documentation: :Property: dataSourceId: The ID of the data source.How to view the data source ID, see ListDataSets.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.DataSourcesProperty.mount_path
documentation: :Property: mountPath: This task needs to be mounted, optional parameters, and the mounting path is configured in the default code source.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.JobSpecsProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param ecs_spec: true
param extra_pod_spec: true
param image: true
param image_config: true
param pod_count: true
param resource_config: true
param type: true
param use_spot_instance: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.JobSpecsProperty.ecs_spec
documentation: :Property: ecsSpec: Worker hardware specifications.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.JobSpecsProperty.image
documentation:
:Property:

image: The running image address of this type of Worker.
You can call ListImages to obtain the community and PAI-optimized images provided by the PAI platform. It is also possible to specify an image publicized by a third party.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.JobSpecsProperty.pod_count
documentation: :Property: podCount: The count of pod.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.JobSpecsProperty.type
documentation:
:Property:

type: Type is closely related to Job Type, and different Job Types support different Worker Types.
TFJob: supports Chief, PS, Worker, Evaluator, GraphLearn
PyTorchJob: Support Worker, Master
XGBoostJob: support Worker, Master
The Master in PyTorchJob and XGBoostJob is optional; if the Master is not specified, the system will automatically regard the first Worker node as the Master node.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.JobSpecsProperty.use_spot_instance
documentation: :Property: useSpotInstance: Whether to use spot instance

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.JobSpecsProperty.extra_pod_spec
documentation: :Property: extraPodSpec: Extra pod configuration.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.JobSpecsProperty.image_config
documentation: :Property: imageConfig: The configuration of image

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.JobSpecsProperty.resource_config
documentation: :Property: resourceConfig: Resource configuration.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.UserVpcProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param extended_cid_rs: true
param security_group_id: true
param switch_id: true
param vpc_id: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.UserVpcProperty.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: User VPC ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.UserVpcProperty.extended_cid_rs
documentation:
:Property:

extendedCidRs: Expansion network segment
When the switch ID is empty, this parameter can not be provided, and the system will automatically obtain all network segments under the VPC;
When the switch ID is not empty, this parameter must be provided. It is recommended to fill in all the network segments under the VPC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.UserVpcProperty.security_group_id
documentation: :Property: securityGroupId: The ID of the user security group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJob.UserVpcProperty.switch_id
documentation:
:Property:

switchId: The ID of the user switch, optional parameter
When the parameter value is empty, the system will automatically select the appropriate switch according to the inventory situation;
You can also specify the switch ID yourself.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PAIDLC::Job`, which is used to create a Machine Learning Platform for AI (PAI) job to run in a cluster.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Job` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-paidlc-job>

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `RosJob`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-paidlc-job>

```
param display_name



param job_specs



param job_type



param user_command



param workspace_id



param code_source



param data_sources



param envs



param job_max_running_time_minutes



param options



param priority



param resource_id



param settings



param success_policy



param thirdparty_lib_dir



param thirdparty_libs



param user_vpc

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.display_name
documentation:
:Property:

displayName: The name of the task is as follows:
The name length does not exceed 256 characters.
Allow numbers, letters, lower strokes (_), English period (.) And short horizontal lines (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.job_specs
documentation:
:Property:

jobSpecs: Jobspecs describes various configurations of tasks during the mission, such as mirror address, start command, node resource statement, number of copies, etc.
The DLC task consists of different types of nodes. The same type of nodes have exactly the same configuration. This configuration is called a Jobspec. Jobspecs describes the configuration of all types of nodes and is the array of Jobspec.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.job_type
documentation: :Property: jobType: The type of job. Values: TFJob, PyTorchJob, XGBoostJob, OneFlowJob, ElasticBatch

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.user_command
documentation: :Property: userCommand: Start commands of all nodes in the task.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.workspace_id
documentation: :Property: workspaceId: Work space ID, how to get working space ID, see listworkSpaces.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.code_source
documentation: :Property: codeSource: The code source used in this task.Before the mission node starts, the DLC will automatically download the code configured in the code source, and mount to the local directory of the container.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.data_sources
documentation: :Property: dataSources: List of data source used for task operation.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.envs
documentation: :Property: envs: Environment variable configuration.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.job_max_running_time_minutes
documentation: :Property: jobMaxRunningTimeMinutes: The longest running time is running, and the unit is minutes.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.options
documentation: :Property: options: The additional configuration of this task can adjust some of the behavior of the mounting data source through this parameter.If the task has a data source that mounted the OSS type, you can cover the default parameters of the jinofs by configure the configuration of this parameter to fs.OSS.DOWNLOAD.CONCURRENCY = 4, fs.oss.download.queue.size = 16.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.priority
documentation:
:Property:

priority: The priority of the task, optional parameter, default value 1, the range of parameter values is 1 ~ 9.in:
1 is the minimum priority.
9 is the highest priority.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.resource_id
documentation:
:Property:

resourceId: Resource group ID, optional parameter.
The parameter value is empty indicating that submitted to the public resource group.
If the current working space has been bound to a proprietary resource group, you can specify the corresponding resource group ID here; how to create a proprietary resource group and inquire about the proprietary resource group ID, please refer to the preparation and management of the DLC resource group cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.settings
documentation: :Property: settings: Job settings.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.success_policy
documentation:
:Property:

successPolicy: The successful strategy of distributed multi -machine tasks is currently only supported by TensorFlow's multi -machine task.
ChiefWorker: When it is specified as this value, as long as the Chief's POD is successful, it is considered that the entire task is successful.
All workers: All workers must be successful to think that the entire task is successful.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.thirdparty_lib_dir
documentation: :Property: thirdpartyLibDir: The name folder of the Requirements.txt file is located; before each node runs the specified usercommand, PAI -DLC will take the requirements.txt file from the specified folder and call the PIP Install -R installation.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.thirdparty_libs
documentation: :Property: thirdpartyLibs: Python third-party library list to be installed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.RosJobProps.user_vpc
documentation: :Property: userVpc: User VPC configuration.

documentation:

uri: URI of a dataset:
When DataSourceType is OSS, the format is: OSS: // [OSS-BUCET]. [Endpoint]/[Path].
When the DataSourceType is NAS, the format is: nas:// [nas-filesystem-id]. [Region]/[PATH].

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PAIDLC::Tensorboard`, which is used to create a TensorBoard instance.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PAIDLC::Tensorboard`, which is used to create a TensorBoard instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosTensorboard\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-paidlc-tensorboard>

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidlc.TensorboardProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Tensorboard`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-paidlc-tensorboard>

```
param data_source_id

Property dataSourceId: For dataset ID, see the data set ID, see ListDataSets.

param display_name

Property displayName: Tensorboard name.

param workspace_id

Property workspaceId: Work space ID.How to get working space ID, see ListworkSpaces.

param cpu

Property cpu: CPU nuclear number.

param data_sources

Property dataSources: Data source configuration.

param data_source_type

Property dataSourceType: The type of dataset. Values: OSS,NAS

param job_id

Property jobId: Task ID.How to get the task ID, see Listjobs.

param max_running_time_minutes

Property maxRunningTimeMinutes: The longest running time, the unit is: minutes.

param memory

Property memory: Memory size, the unit is: GB.

param options

Property options: The expansion field of the dataset is JSON format, which currently supports Mountpath: the path of custom dataset mounting.

param source_id

Property sourceId: Source ID.

param source_type

Property sourceType: Source type.

param summary_path

Property summaryPath: Summary directory.

param summary_relative_path

Property summaryRelativePath: Summary relative directory. Summary relative directory and Summary directory are mutually exclusive

param uri

Property uri: URI of a dataset: When DataSourceType is OSS, the format is: OSS: // [OSS-BUCET]. [Endpoint]/[Path]. When the DataSourceType is NAS, the format is: nas:// [nas-filesystem-id]. [Region]/[PATH].
```
